reviews.comment:
Cierran las islas de despacho de combustible sin sentido, hay largas colas de autos para cargar y las filas  sobre la calle obstaculizan la circulación de los peatones y de los autos. No atienden bien al cliente, parece que te hacen un favor. El Full cierra a las 20hs. Los precios de los accesorios (escobillas, etc) son muy caros, se justifican diciendo que el público tiene que pagar más porque es Palermo. Demoran mucho para despachar, no limpian los vidrios de los autos, tenés que pedirles por favor, los empleados miran para otro lado en vez de atenderte, o desaparecen dejando el auto cargando, etc, etc. Una vez me dejaron el tanque sin la tapa y fui perdiendo combustible por la calle.

(Translated by Google)
The fuel pumps close for no reason, there are long lines of cars waiting to fill up, and the lines on the street obstruct pedestrian and vehicular traffic. Customer service is poor; it's like they're doing you a favor. The Full service station closes at 8 PM. Accessories (windshield wipers, etc.) are very expensive; they justify it by saying that customers have to pay more because it's Palermo. They take forever to pump fuel, they don't clean car windows (you have to beg them), the employees look the other way instead of helping you, or they disappear while your car is filling up, etc., etc. Once, they left my tank without the cap, and I was leaking fuel down the street.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2cnRqNUlnEAE

reviews.comment:
Me tocó un mecánico de primera, pero el lugar, son los mismos ladris de siempre, carisimo!!!!
Y eso que entras con la cuota al día o no entras

(Translated by Google)
I got a top-notch mechanic, but the place is the same old crooks, way overpriced!
And you either get in with your current payment or you don't get in at all.
